mprBaseLevel.t1: Unable to determine old base level to determine offset
mprBaseLevel.t2: Cannot find new base level "{0}" for elements
mprBaseLevel.t3: For elements, it was not possible to determine the strategy for assigning a level
mprBaseLevel.t7: Failed to fill parameter "{0}" with value "{1}", please check the units for the parameter
mprBaseLevel.t9: Failed to populate parameter "{0}" with level "{1}"
mprBaseLevel.t11: For elements, the host cannot change, because they are depending on plane or level
mprBaseLevel.t12: Base level change is skipped because the element is already located at level "{0}"
mprBaseLevel.t18: Selection from levels visible in the active view. The option only works for the "Nearest", "Nearest below" and "Nearest above" variants
mprBaseLevel.e1: Failed to set levels for elements that got into the setting under the number {0} due to
mprBaseLevel.e2: An unexpected error occurred while setting levels
mprBaseLevel.e3: Failed to add the setting due to
mprBaseLevel.e4: No levels are visible in the active view, processing by nearest levels is not possible
mprBaseLevel.tt1: Processing at this level is not possible, because now it is not in the model, select another level
mprBaseLevel.u1: Could not determine old top level for offset definition
mprBaseLevel.u2: Could not find new top level "{0}" for elements
mprBaseLevel.u12: Top level change skipped because element is already located at level "{0}"
